endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Bundles for an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/Copies
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Bundles Copies for a Bundle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/Copies
endpoints.description: Creates a new copy of a Bundle. It will internally create copies of all the bundle items (identities and documents) of the original bundle
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/Evaluations
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Evaluations associated to the Bundle resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/Evaluations
endpoints.description: Creates an evaluation for a bundle
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/Evaluations/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/ItemAssignments
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Assigned Items for an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/ItemAssignments
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/ItemAssignments/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/ItemAssignments/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{BundleSid}/ReplaceItems
endpoints.description: Replaces all bundle items in the target bundle (specified in the path) with all the bundle items of the source bundle (specified by the from_bundle_sid body param)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{BUNDLESID}} with a real bundlesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Updates a Bundle in an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/RegulatoryCompliance/Bundles/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
